basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has published the Jr. Research Fellow Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Jr. Research Fellow position. Candidates holding an M.Tech degree or above in Mechanical, Aerospace, Chemical, Environmental Engineering, or equivalent with a CGPA higher than 8.0, along with knowledge of combustion fundamentals, chemical kinetics, Cantera modeling, experimental instrumentation, and NET/GATE qualification (relaxable for CFTI graduates with CGPA above 8.000), are eligible to apply through email mode.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech degree or above in Mechanical/ Aerospace/ Chemical/Environmental engineering or equivalent with CGPA higher than 8, Fundamentals of Combustion, chemical kinetics, Model flames in Cantera, Experience with instrumentation of experimental setups with NET/GATE (relaxable for CFTI graduates with CGPA >8.000)
qualification.details: M.Tech degree or above in Mechanical/ Aerospace/ Chemical/Environmental engineering or equivalent with CGPA higher than 8. Should have knowledge of fundamentals of Combustion and chemical kinetics. Should know how to model flames in Cantera. Should also have some experience with instrumentation of experimental setups. NET/GATE qualification is required. The requirement of NET/GATE may be relaxed for candidates from CFTIs with CGPA >8.000.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Jr. Research Fellow position at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your completed application via email is 10-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Tech degree or above in Mechanical, Aerospace, Chemical, or Environmental engineering with a CGPA higher than 8. Specific knowledge in combustion, kinetics, and flame modeling is also required.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Jr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000 plus HRA at 27%.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Jr. Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two stages: initial shortlisting of applications followed by an online interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this job opening?
faq.answer: Interested candidates are required to apply via email. Make sure to follow the application instructions carefully.

faq.question: Q7. Does IIT Delhi offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Jr. Research Fellow recruitment at IIT Delhi is IITD/IRD/132/2026.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from CFTIs with a CGPA greater than 8.000 apply even if they don't have NET/GATE?
faq.answer: Yes, the requirement of NET/GATE may be relaxed for candidates graduating from CFTIs with a CGPA greater than 8.000.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website is also provided for further details.
